name: Shanghai Kaichuang Marine International Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Kaichuang Marine International Co., Ltd. engages in offshore fishing business in China and internationally. It also processes and sells aquatic products, such as yellowfin tuna and albacore tuna, as well as tuna fish fillets and related products. It also offers foods, including beans and meat, as well as produces other products. The company's fleet includes 3 trawl processing vessels and 10 tuna purse seine fishing vessels. Shanghai Kaichuang Marine International Co., Ltd. is based in Shanghai, China.
